results.title: How New Fans Can Get Started With Horse Racing
results.description: Horse racing is one of the world's oldest spectator sports, blending speed, strategy, and tradition into an exciting experience. For first-time fans, however, the unfamiliar terminology, race formats, and fast-paced action can make it difficult to know exactly what's happening...

results.title: 'Historic victory' as judges quash closure of Bromley adult education centre
results.description: A disabled man has won a court battle to prevent the closure of Poverest Adult Education Centre in Orpington.

results.title: Govt targeting criminal wealth in heightened asset seizure push – AG
results.description: The Guyana Government will be ramping up efforts to go after assets obtained from criminal activities or through illegal means. This was revealed by Attorney General (AG) and Legal Affairs Minister SC Anil Nandlall on Wednesday as he spoke about the successes local law enforcement agencies have had in going after the assets of criminals. results.title: Modern markets offer hope for Kisumu traders despite project delays
results.description: Traders across Kisumu County have expressed optimism over the construction of 14 modern markets under the national government’s Economic Stimulus Programme (ESP), saying the facilities could improve hygiene, reduce post-harvest losses and boost incomes. However, they are also demanding faster implementation and greater transparency after contracts for some projects were terminated without public explanation. The [...]
